expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材尺寸。[宽度]、[高度]、[深度] 是总测量值，[板厚] 是顶部、底部和侧面板的材料厚度，[背板厚度] 是背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] are total measurements, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom, and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan untuk papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan untuk papan latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดกระดานสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดทั้งหมด, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุบอร์ดด้านบน ด้านล่างและด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุบอร์ดพื้นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu cho ván trên, dưới và bên cạnh, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu cho ván nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng kahoy para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay ang kabuuang sukat, [BoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal sa Tuktok, Ibaba, at Gilid na Kahoy, [BackBoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal ng Kahoy sa Likuran. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: အရွက်နဲ့ကျောက်ဆောင်ပါကန့်သတ်ပါ။ [Width], [Height], [Depth] သည်စုစွမ်းအားအတိုင်းအတာများဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BoardThick] သည်ထိပ်ဆောင်၊ အောက်ဆောင်နှင့်ဘေးဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်ခံဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထူကိုဆိုလိုသည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាឧបករណ៍សម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជាការវាស់ចុះស្តាំទាំងស្រុង [BoardThick] គឺជាយកផ្ទៃការរាប់ ហើយ [BackBoardThick] សម្រាប់សំណាញ់បច្ចុប្បន្ន។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະໜາດຂອງໄມ້ສໍາລັບຕູ້. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ແມ່ນຂໍ້ມູນສັງລວມ. [BoardThick]: ຄວາມໜາສຸດຂອງວັດສະດຸໄມ້ທຸກດ້ານດຽວ, [BackBoardThick]: ຄວາມໜາສຸດຂອງໃບຫຼັງ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットの板サイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth] は全体の寸法に対応し、[BoardThick] は上部、底部、側板の厚さ、[BackBoardThick] は裏板の厚さを示します。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 판 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 전체 치수를 의미하며, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 옆면 판재 두께를 나타내고, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 판재 두께를 나타냅니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] son las medidas totales, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de las tablas superior, inferior y laterales, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla trasera. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des planches pour une armoire. [Width], [Height], [Depth] représentent les dimensions totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des planches supérieure, inférieure et latérale, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet Brettergrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind die Gesamtmaße, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke für die obere, untere und seitliche Platte, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückwand. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप हैं, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] बैकग्राउंड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] - это общие размеры, [BoardThick] - это толщина материала для верхней, нижней и боковой доски, [BackBoardThick] - это толщина материала для задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
